news-global-econ.title: Spanberger ripped after taking credit for billions in investments secured under GOP predecessor: 'Pathetic'
news-global-econ.description: Virginia Dem Governor Abigail Spanberger touted $7.1 billion in investment and 3,250 new jobs this week, but the investments were actually announced under former Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin.

news-global-econ.title: Pence launches GOP messaging blitz on ‘One Big Beautiful Bill’ ahead of midterms
news-global-econ.description: Pence's Advancing American Freedom rolls out a $10 million campaign and a policy booklet to help Republicans message on taxes ahead of midterms.

news-global-econ.title: Russia offers sanctioned LNG to energy-hungry Asia at a discount
news-global-econ.description: The effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz — and attacks on the world’s largest LNG export plant in Qatar — has throttled about a fifth of global supply, upending the gas market and lifting prices

news-global-econ.title: Actor Anthony Anderson Trashes Artemis II Moon Mission as a Waste of Money: 'What's It All For'
news-global-econ.description:
Actor Anthony Anderson claimed the moon mission is a waste of money, citing various issues such as "homelessness" and underfunded programs, which he says still need to be addressed on earth.

news-korea-soc.title: Gulf States Report Iranian Strikes Following Ceasefire Announcement
news-korea-soc.description: The United Arab Emirates (UAE), Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, and Kuwait reported on Wednesday that they had documented airstrikes, mostly on their energy facilities, that they attributed to Iran, hours after Iran and the United States announced they had agreed to a…

news-global-soc.title: Trump Vows U.S. Forces to Stay Near Iran Until 'Real Agreement' Is Reached as ‘Next Conquest’ Awaits
news-global-soc.description: All U.S. forces now deployed near Iran will remain stationed in the area until a “real agreement” is reached with Tehran, President Donald Trump vowed late Wednesday night, as Washington enters a fragile two-week ceasefire and prepares for its "next conquest.…

news-global-soc.title: We could win the AI war and still lose all of our freedoms if we aren’t careful
news-global-soc.description: The U.S. races to outpace China in AI with trillions in investment, but without guardrails, the technology could threaten the freedoms it aims to protect.

news-global-soc.title: Schumer blasts Trump’s Iran war as failure, moves to rein in his war powers amid ceasefire
news-global-soc.description: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., plans to force another war powers vote to rein in President Donald Trump's use of the military in Iran amid a fragile ceasefire.
